PROMPT: I'm building a cross-asset momentum report and need a comprehensive technical analysis comparison across three assets: AAPL (stock), BTC/USD (crypto), and EUR/USD (forex). Here's what I need you to do: First, fetch 90-day daily OHLCV price history (from 2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31) for all three assets. From each price series, identify the single date where the CLOSE price was at its absolute MAXIMUM over that 90-day window — call these dates D_AAPL, D_BTC, and D_EUR. Then, for each of those three peak-close dates specifically, retrieve the RSI(14) value on that exact date by querying RSI data over the full 90-day period and looking up that date's RSI in the results. Next, fetch MACD(12,26,9) data over the same 90-day window for each asset and extract the MACD histogram value ('macd_hist') on each respective peak-close date D_AAPL, D_BTC, and D_EUR. Finally, fetch the 20-period Bollinger Bands for each asset over the same 90-day window and extract the upper_band value on each asset's peak-close date. Report the final summary table: for each of the three assets, show the peak-close date, the peak close price, the RSI(14) on that peak date, the MACD histogram on that peak date, and the upper Bollinger Band on that peak date.
GTFA_CLAIMS: [{"step": 1, "description": "Fetch 90-day daily price series for AAPL (2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31) — produces ~90 OHLCV bars", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeries", "output_characteristics": "~90 bars each with open/high/low/close/volume; agent must scan all to find max close"}, {"step": 2, "description": "Fetch 90-day daily price series for BTC/USD — produces ~90 OHLCV bars", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeries", "output_characteristics": "~90 bars; agent must find max close date D_BTC"}, {"step": 3, "description": "Fetch 90-day daily price series for EUR/USD — produces ~90 OHLCV bars; extract D_AAPL, D_BTC, D_EUR (the three peak-close dates)", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeries", "output_characteristics": "~90 bars; after this step agent must remember D_AAPL, D_BTC, D_EUR as signals", "signal_to_remember": "D_AAPL, D_BTC, D_EUR — three peak-close dates buried in 270 total rows across three calls"}, {"step": 4, "description": "Fetch RSI(14) for AAPL over 90-day window — produces ~90 RSI rows; agent must look up value at D_AAPL", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi", "output_characteristics": "~90 RSI data points; only one is relevant (the one matching D_AAPL)", "dependency_on_step": 1, "uses_signal": "D_AAPL"}, {"step": 5, "description": "Fetch RSI(14) for BTC/USD over 90-day window; look up RSI at D_BTC", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi", "output_characteristics": "~90 RSI rows; only D_BTC row is relevant", "dependency_on_step": 2, "uses_signal": "D_BTC"}, {"step": 6, "description": "Fetch RSI(14) for EUR/USD over 90-day window; look up RSI at D_EUR", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi", "output_characteristics": "~90 RSI rows; only D_EUR row is relevant", "dependency_on_step": 3, "uses_signal": "D_EUR"}, {"step": 7, "description": "Fetch MACD(12,26,9) for AAPL, BTC/USD, EUR/USD; extract macd_hist at each respective peak date", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesMacd", "output_characteristics": "~3x90 = 270 MACD rows each with macd/macd_signal/macd_hist; agent must pinpoint exactly the peak-date row per asset", "dependency_on_step": [1, 2, 3], "uses_signal": "D_AAPL, D_BTC, D_EUR"}, {"step": 8, "description": "Fetch Bollinger Bands(20,2) for AAPL, BTC/USD, EUR/USD; extract upper_band at each respective peak date", "required_tool": "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesBBands", "output_characteristics": "~3x90 = 270 BBands rows each with upper_band/middle_band/lower_band; agent must find the peak-date row per asset", "dependency_on_step": [1, 2, 3], "uses_signal": "D_AAPL, D_BTC, D_EUR"}, {"step": 9, "description": "Assemble final summary: for each asset, report peak-close date, peak close price, RSI(14) on that date, MACD hist on that date, and upper BBand on that date", "required_tool": null, "dependency_on_step": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8], "uses_signal": "D_AAPL, D_BTC, D_EUR and all extracted indicator values on those dates"}]
EVALUATION_RULES: {"required_tools": ["twelvedata_GetTimeSeries", "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi", "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesMacd", "twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesBBands"], "forbidden_tools": [], "minimum_tool_calls": 9, "signal_extraction_step": 3, "signal_usage_step": 9, "noise_characteristics": "Each GetTimeSeries call returns up to 90 daily OHLCV bars with open/high/low/close/volume fields; RSI/MACD/BBands calls each return 90 data rows; agent must scan all rows to find maximum close price date and then locate that specific date in three separate indicator series, all of which contain irrelevant data points."}
